name: @aqua/plugin-integrations
description: Per-client + per-agency integrations registry. Records connection intent + config-shape for Stripe / Mailchimp / Google / Meta / Slack / Zapier / custom-webhook. Credentials referenced via @aqua/plugin-credentials-vault — this plugin does NOT decrypt; it stores a credentialsRef. Manual verify only; real OAuth + outbound auth wiring is a T6 prod gate. Ships a placeholder webhook log (ring-buffer; no real receivers).
